history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 2, column B, facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. To reach it, I need to move east along row 2 to column E, then go down through safe cells, eventually moving left to column B and then down to row 8. My next immediate step is to move forward to cell (2,C), which is empty and safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column C, facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. I need to move right to column E, then go down to row 6, then left to column B, then down to row 8, then right to the goal. My next step is to move forward to column D, which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column D, facing right. The next cell to the east (E) is empty and safe. I need to continue right to reach column E, then turn down to go south.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column E, facing right. I need to go down to row 3, then row 4, row 5, row 6, then move left to column B, then down to row 7 and row 8, then right to the goal. First, I need to face down. Turning clockwise will change my orientation from right to down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column E, facing down. The cell directly below at row 3, column E is empty (.). I will move forward to advance toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column E, facing down. The cell directly below at row 4, column E is '.' (safe). I will move forward to continue downward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column E, facing down. The cell directly below at row 5, column E is '.' (safe). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column E, facing down. The cell directly below at row 6, column E is '.' (safe). I will move forward to continue downward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column E, facing down. The cell below (row 7, column E) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to go left to navigate around the lava. To face left, I will turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I need to go left to get around the lava below me. Since I am facing left, I can move forward to cell (6, D) which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row6 column D facing left. I need to navigate to the goal at row8 column H. The safe path is to go left to column B, then down to row8, then right to H. Moving forward now will take me to (6,C), which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row6 column C, facing left. I need to go left to column B, then down to row8, then right to goal at H. Moving forward to column B is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row6 column B, facing left. To go down toward row8, I need to change my orientation to face down. Turning counter-clockwise from left gives down. Then I can move forward to (7,B) which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row6 column B facing down. The cell directly below (row7 column B) is a floor cell. Moving forward will take me there safely.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row7 column B facing down. The cell directly below (row8 column B) is a floor cell. Moving forward will take me safely there, and I'll be closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row8 column B facing down. The cell below is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal is to the right at column H. To face right, I need to rotate counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and the next cell to the east (row8, column C) is a floor cell. I can safely move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

FRENTE
